reviews.title: Just Ok
reviews.text: This hotel was ok. I wouldn’t go back and stay though. It was small, only 2 floors. They only had queen beds available, which was disappointing since my husband and I look forward to King sized when we travel. There was no fan in the bathroom. They have a “no smoking policy” yet the whole second floor stunk like pot the second we got to our room. The breakfast wasn’t that great...limited seating, limited food choices- cereal, bagels, sausage, eggs (which were probably powder eggs). Parking was not that great- small lot in the front & a tiny alleyway to get to the back to park, so if you have a big SUV/Truck, this could be problematic. It seemed clean. We only stayed one night. They are under construction right now, so maybe it will get better. Doubtful thought.

reviews.title: Completely disgusted with what I paid for this room.
reviews.negatives: Highly disappointed for the money I paid! The man at check in was rude and no personality. I finally get up to my room and tv was on one of the queen beds was not fixed as if someone sat on it. The bathroom had urine on floor and someone’s garbage in the can still, in addition bathroom floor towel was on floor from last person there.

reviews.title: Could have been better
reviews.text:
No A/C  in small stuffy room. Had a queen bed but no room to move in room itself. 
Travelling with another couple who booked a king and ended up with two doubles. 
A lot of traffic of people with no reservations.  Not a comfortable feeling overall

reviews.title: My welcome was not warm. The lobby was under construction.
reviews.text: I left in early morning hours and requested a receipt of my stay and their system was not yet ready to perform my request. The agent promised me that it would be emailed to me later that morning once their system was set. To-date, I have yet to receive a receipt via email or in any other manner.

reviews.title: Great 1N Stay
reviews.text: Booked connecting rooms and good new was I got it.  BAD NEWS was my side of the door would not open despite unlocking the door.  Front Desk staff tried to pull with all his might, but door wouldn't budge.  That was the only downer, as the kids were looking forward to the connecting rooms.  Otherwise, the rooms were clean and pretty updated.  Loved the breakfast, which featured a fancy Nes Cafe machine.  I made a mocha cappuccino.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.negatives: The only thing was the ours of breakfast and the breakfast itself could of been somewhat better

reviews.title: Overnight Visit to Fairfield
reviews.text:
Pros: The location is great if you're looking to go to Blackrock  Turnpike area or to downtown Fairfield. Also close to 15 and 95.
It is also not far from Fairfield U or Sacred Heart University if you're visiting colleges. 

Cons: None really.... I will say our room was a little tiny (we didn't mind because we were only there for the night & it was still very clean) but I know other rooms aren't as cramped from visiting last year. 

Also, they're in the process of remodeling so the lobby was a little hectic but overall it didn't effect our stay.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: The room itself was not in a good location.  It was just behind the check in desk, next to the kitchen, and across from the gym.  The person in the room above us walked around that room frequently, and it was quite loud.  I would have preferred a room on the second floor, and should have changed rooms.

reviews.title: Tolerable for 1 night
reviews.positives: The bed was comfortable. The room was clean. No bugs. Some breakfast choices were good ..fresh fruit, bagels, toast, cereal, yogurt.
reviews.negatives: The overhead  bathroom light was like a strobe... Very blinky, The other bath light was way too bright. The tub faucet dripped all the time. The luggage rack was broken. The room was too tight! Hard to move around between the queen bed and bureau. The cabinet door to the refrigerator did not open fully due to the bed being in the way. There were no directions on how to use the cable box, TV or remote and what channels were available. The breakfast was just alright. Powdered eggs, overcooked sausage patties, rubbery self made pancakes. ⁴

reviews.positives: Rooms were nice and clean. Comfortable bed.
reviews.negatives: Bring good ear plugs. I did. The hotel is located right next to the Interstate and it is loud. With ear plugs and the thick pillows I ended up sleeping just fine.

reviews.title: See above
reviews.positives: The hotel was very clean, and up-to-date. In addition, the staff was very kind and accommodating to my needs. I live less than 10 minutes away, bur my mother was visiting and I wanted it to be special  She absolutely loved the hotel and did not want to leave. Thank you.
reviews.negatives: The price was a little high.
